name: Mattingly Ford Title Services, LLC- Headquarters
description_short: Mattingly Ford Title Services is a title agency and escrow company offering residential and commercial closing services across five states.
description_long:
Mattingly Ford Title Services, LLC is a title agency and escrow services provider that has established itself as a comprehensive closing solution for real estate transactions. The company operates across Florida, Indiana, Ohio, Kentucky, and Tennessee, serving homeowners, real estate professionals, lenders, and commercial clients. Based on testimonials from industry professionals including loan officers and realtors, the company has built a reputation within its regional markets over an extended period.

The company offers title and escrow closing services for both residential and commercial real estate transactions. Their service offerings include title ordering, comprehensive closing coordination, escrow handling, and related transaction services. They provide tools for cost estimation through a fee calculator and offer integration with Earnnest, a digital payments platform for secure fund transfers. The company also maintains resources for real estate agents including forms, a blog with industry updates, and educational content on topics like wire fraud prevention.

Mattingly Ford distinguishes itself through emphasis on personalized service and flexibility. Testimonials highlight attributes such as work ethic, efficiency, responsiveness, and the ability to handle complex transactions. The company markets itself around the concept of stress-free, start-to-close services with friendly, responsive customer interactions. They position themselves as partners to financial and real estate professionals rather than transactional service providers.

As a title and escrow agency rather than a mortgage lender, Mattingly Ford facilitates closings but does not originate loans. Their service quality depends on operational execution, staff expertise, and responsiveness—factors difficult to verify independently from the testimonials provided. The company's regional focus (five states) means availability is geographically limited, and no information is publicly available regarding pricing, response times, complaint history, or service guarantees.
pros: Operates across five states (Florida, Indiana, Ohio, Kentucky, Tennessee) providing regional reach
Offers both residential and commercial transaction expertise with capacity for complex deals
Provides digital closing options and integrates with Earnnest for secure digital fund transfers
Supplies comprehensive tools including fee calculator, agent forms, and educational blog content
Emphasizes personalized service with testimonials citing strong communication and customer service
Handles start-to-close coordination reducing need for clients to coordinate multiple parties
Services all transaction parties: homeowners, agents, lenders, and commercial clients
cons: Limited geographic availability to only five states may exclude consumers in other regions
As a title/escrow company, they do not originate mortgages—consumers must secure financing elsewhere
No publicly available pricing information, complaint data, or performance metrics on website
Testimonials are cherry-picked and do not represent independent third-party verification of service quality
No information on licensing, certifications, or bonding requirements disclosed on website
best_for: Real estate buyers and sellers in Florida, Indiana, Ohio, Kentucky, or Tennessee needing closing services
Real estate agents and brokers seeking reliable title and escrow partnerships for client transactions
Commercial real estate investors and lenders requiring title services for complex multi-property transactions
Mortgage lenders and financial institutions needing closing and title coordination services
diagnosis: Mattingly Ford is best suited for real estate professionals and consumers closing transactions in their five-state service area who want personalized title and escrow coordination. The key caveat is that they facilitate closings but do not provide mortgage lending—homebuyers must secure financing through a separate lender before using their services.
services: Closing cost estimation through fee calculator
Integration with Earnnest digital payments platform
Wire fraud prevention resources for buyers
